words.example: We play soccer in the afternoon.
I eat breakfast at seven every day.
We had lunch at school.
My family has dinner together.
Mom is cooking in the kitchen.
There are many flowers in the garden.
The street is very busy today.
I go to school by subway.
I bought a ticket for the movie.
Take your umbrella. It will rain.
He put the key in his pocket.
The clock on the wall is old.
We watch TV after dinner.
words.exampleKo: 우리는 저녁 식사 후에 TV를 본다.

words.example: She can speak English well.
words.exampleKo: 그녀는 영어를 잘 말할 수 있다.

words.example: I like to talk with my friends.
You can ask the teacher a question.
Please call me after school.
He carries a heavy bag every day.
words.exampleKo: 그는 매일 무거운 가방을 들고 다닌다.

words.example: The dog can catch the ball.
words.exampleKo: 그 개는 공을 잡을 수 있다.

words.example: We climb the mountain every fall.
Look both ways before you cross the road.
The baby began to cry loudly.
My dad drives me to school.
words.exampleKo: 아빠가 나를 학교까지 차로 태워다 주신다.

words.example: I enjoy reading comic books.
Please knock before you enter the room.
words.exampleKo: 방에 들어가기 전에 노크를 해 주세요.

words.example: Birds fly high in the sky.
The puppy follows me everywhere.
What happened at school today?
Hurry up, or we will be late.
words.exampleKo: 서둘러, 안 그러면 우리는 늦을 거야.

words.example: The funny movie made us laugh.
words.exampleKo: 그 웃긴 영화는 우리를 웃게 만들었다.

words.example: We will move to a new house next month.
words.exampleKo: 우리는 다음 달에 새 집으로 이사할 것이다.

words.example: Plants need water and sunlight.
Push the door to open it.
Pull the rope as hard as you can.
words.exampleKo: 할 수 있는 만큼 세게 밧줄을 당겨라.

words.example: Are you ready for the test?
This math problem is very easy.
